SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.io

Class Sysout

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.io.Sysout
public class Sysout extends Object
Represents a system output (sysout) object containing relevant metadata and utilities for processing job-related outputs. This class defines properties related to jobs, steps, system files, and their associated outputs. Instances of this class store details about sysout files, including their relationships to job definitions, file naming conventions, and whether the sysout represents a log file.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • Sysout

      public Sysout(String sysout, Job job, Step step, Dd dd)
      Constructs a Sysout object with specified sysout, job, step, and dd metadata. This constructor initializes the sysout properties and generates the associated file name.
      Parameters:
      sysout - the sysout string representing the system output
      job - the Job object associated with this sysout
      step - the Step object associated with this sysout
      dd - the Dd object associated with this sysout

  • Method Details

    • isLog

      public boolean isLog()
      Determines whether the current sysout represents a log file.
      Returns:
      true if the sysout is represented by an asterisk (*), indicating a log file; false otherwise

    • getFilename

      public String getFilename()
      Generates the filename for the sysout file, including the file extension. The resulting filename is constructed by appending the ".txt" extension to the string returned by getFilenameWithoutExtension().
      Returns:
      the sysout filename including the ".txt" extension.

    • getFilenameWithoutExtension

      public String getFilenameWithoutExtension()
      Generates the filename for the sysout file without including the file extension. The filename is constructed using the job name, step name, DD name, and a unique UUID. This method is useful for generating consistent and unique filenames for sysout files.
      Returns:
      the generated sysout filename without a file extension
